activities_projects.title: Identify Garden Objects
activities_projects.objective: Recognise common objects found in a garden
steps: Look at the pictures given in the textbook
Identify the garden items such as hose, sapling, hedge, and flower pot
Write the correct names below each picture
Discuss your answers with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn vocabulary related to gardens and plants
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of garden objects (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Design Your Dream Garden
steps: Think about the kind of garden you would like to have
Draw your dream garden on paper
Include features such as flowers, trees, and pathways
Explain why you chose those features
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creativity and appreciation for nature
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and explanation of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Understanding the Meaning of 'Concrete'
activities_projects.objective: Understand multiple meanings of the word 'concrete'
steps: Read the title of the poem carefully
Discuss what the word 'concrete' means
List different meanings of the word
Share your ideas with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how words can have more than one meaning

activities_projects.title: Poem Reading Activity
steps: Read the poem aloud in class
Pay attention to rhythm and rhyme
Take turns reading each stanza
Discuss the main idea of the poem
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve reading fluency and understanding of poetry
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of reading and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Summary of the Poem
activities_projects.objective: Understand the main idea of the poem
steps: Read the poem again carefully
Fill in the blanks in the summary exercise
Use exact words from the poem
Check answers with your teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the key ideas of the poem

activities_projects.title: Tone Identification Activity
activities_projects.objective: Identify the tone and mood of the poem
steps: Read the poem carefully
Discuss the feelings expressed in the poem
Choose the correct tone such as humorous or light-hearted
Explain your choice
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand tone and mood in poetry

activities_projects.title: Find Alliteration
steps: Read the poem slowly
Find words that repeat the same starting sound
Write those examples in your notebook
Share your answers in class

activities_projects.title: Word Meaning Activity
steps: Identify words such as 'peculiar', 'delicate', and 'lovely'
Choose correct synonyms from the options
Write the meanings in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and word usage

activities_projects.title: Apology Role Play
steps: Read the situations given in the textbook
Work with a partner
One student apologises and the other responds
Practice both informal and formal apologies
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn polite language and communication skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and correctness of dialogue (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Herbarium Art Project
activities_projects.objective: Develop interest in plants and creativity
steps: Collect fallen leaves and flowers
Place them between newspaper sheets
Keep heavy books on top for a week
Use the dried plants to create a greeting card or artwork
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about plant preservation and creative art
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and neatness of artwork (10 marks)
